cannot_determine: This appears to be a colonoscopy simulation or training video, not an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task. The frames show endoscopic views of what appears to be a colon model with distance measurements and examination instructions, which is unrelated to the five standardized FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture).
